examples: One apt word can be much clearer than a flurry of circumlocution.
This sort of ritual circumlocution is common to many parts of mathematics.
With typical circumlocution, King Abdullah of Saudi Arabia recently said as much.
Or will you allow me to go straight, without any circumlocution, to our little agenda?
This would not be the first time a bit of linguistic circumlocution got the country out of a revenue bind.
